sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Euronet Worldwide Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
feed.summary: Euronet Worldwide announced its financial results for Q4 and full year 2025, showing revenue growth and strategic expansions despite an 18% decrease in Q4 operating income. The company reported a 6% increase in full-year revenues and a 12% rise in full-year adjusted earnings per share. Euronet projects double-digit adjusted earnings growth for 2026, driven by its digital-first strategy and capital allocation.

feed.title: Kimco, TransUnion, Crocs Deliver Q4 Results and Guidance
feed.summary: Kimco Realty, TransUnion, and Crocs, Inc. have released their Q4 earnings reports, showing a mix of strong performances and strategic adaptations. Kimco and TransUnion both surpassed EPS and revenue expectations, driven by high occupancy rates and strategic transformations respectively. Crocs also exceeded earnings forecasts, despite a challenging retail market, through strategic cost savings and brand strengthening.

feed.title: The 2026 Porsche Macan GTS Electric Is Your EV Giga-Hatch: Review
feed.summary: The 2026 Porsche Macan GTS Electric offers a compelling blend of performance and luxury, positioned between the 4S and Turbo trims. With 563 horsepower from dual electric motors, it achieves a 0-60 mph sprint in 3.6 seconds and provides enhanced handling, especially with optional summer performance tires. Starting at $107,650, the GTS delivers a powerful driving experience that maintains comfort for daily use despite its sporty enhancements.

feed.title: Euronet Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
feed.summary: Euronet Worldwide, Inc. announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year 2025, highlighting revenue growth but noting pressures in Money Transfer and epay segments. Despite these challenges, the company achieved a 12% increase in full-year adjusted earnings per share and expects further double-digit adjusted earnings growth in 2026 due to strategic investments and diversified revenue streams. Key achievements include the planned acquisition of CrediaBank's merchant acquiring business and expanded digital partnerships.

feed.title: VSEE - VSee Health, Inc. Latest Stock News & Market Updates
feed.summary: This page provides the latest news and updates for VSee Health, Inc. (NASDAQ: VSEE), a telehealth technology company. It focuses on the company's developments in AI-powered virtual care, digital health infrastructure, and capital markets. The news includes strategic partnerships, product launches, financial disclosures, and compliance updates, offering insights into VSee Health's evolving business and financial health.

feed.title: Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies (WAB) Margin Improvement Reinforces Bullish Services And Digital Narratives
feed.summary: Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies (WAB) reported Q3 FY 2025 revenue of US$2.9 billion and basic EPS of US$1.81, with trailing twelve-month net profit margins increasing to 10.9%. This margin improvement supports a bullish narrative focused on higher-margin services and digital offerings, despite concerns about declining freight backlog and softer North American demand. However, the company's P/E ratio of 37x is rich compared to its intrinsic DCF value of US$181.33 and peer averages, suggesting overvaluation in the market.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley now expects 2026 PC shipments to decline more than 5% YoY
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley now projects a decline of over 5% in global PC shipments for 2026, following a significant 14% miss in January notebook builds from top ODMs. This revised outlook is driven by weakening consumer demand due to higher memory-related prices and OEMs shifting towards higher-margin PC products. The firm anticipates a sharp 11% year-over-year drop in Q1 2026 notebook builds, potentially leading to a 10%+ decline in PC unit shipments for the entire year unless February or March show significant upside.

feed.title: Baxter shares plunge 14% after earnings miss, weak profit guidance By Investing.com
feed.summary: Baxter International Inc. (NYSE:BAX) shares plummeted 14% after reporting fourth-quarter earnings that missed analyst expectations and issuing weak profit guidance for fiscal year 2026. Despite revenue exceeding estimates, adjusted EPS fell short, and the company's outlook of $1.85 to $2.05 per share was significantly below the consensus of $2.25, leading to a substantial stock decline. CEO Andrew Hider acknowledged the results did not meet expectations but expressed confidence in the company's long-term trajectory and its new operating model.

feed.title: Baxter International Reports Mixed Q4 Results and Outlook
feed.summary: Baxter International reported mixed Q4 2025 results with an 8% sales increase to $2.97 billion but a 24% decrease in adjusted diluted EPS from continuing operations, and a significant GAAP loss. The company also announced a board refresh, including a new appointment and two resignations, alongside guidance for roughly flat 2026 sales and lower adjusted EPS. An analyst maintains a Hold rating, while TipRanks' AI Analyst Spark rates BAX as Neutral due to financial weakness and operational headwinds.

feed.title: West Pharmaceutical Services Posts Solid Q4 and 2025 Results

feed.title: Boeing Says Goodbye To It's Last 787-8 Dreamliner Test Airplane After More Than 16 Years In Service
feed.summary: Boeing has retired its last 787-8 Dreamliner test aircraft, ZA004, after over 16 years of service and more than 670 test flights. The aircraft, which played a crucial role in establishing performance and safety standards for the Dreamliner, will be stripped for spare parts at Pinal Airpark in Marana, Arizona, as further maintenance is no longer cost-effective. Its legacy will live on through every 787 Dreamliner currently flying and those yet to be delivered.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (BAX) Baxter International Inc. Reports Q4 Revenue $2.97B, vs. FactSet Est of $2.82B

Baxter International also provided an adjusted EPS range of $1.85 to $2.05 for 2026, against an estimated $2.24.

feed.title: F5 Inc. Stock: Quiet Cloud Powerhouse Or Next-Gen Networking Value Trap?
feed.summary: The article discusses F5 Inc.'s stock performance over the past year, highlighting its quiet rally driven by demand for secure application delivery amidst a shift from hardware to software and services. It examines recent catalysts like strong quarterly earnings from software and subscription growth and product enhancements for multi-cloud environments. The piece also delves into Wall Street's cautious but optimistic view, the company's strategic pivot towards software-defined cloud and security services, and the risks balanced against F5's potential as a stable investment in enterprise tech.

feed.title: Rockwell Automation (ROK, NYSE) pre-market 12 Feb 2026: ROK stock shows AI-driven upside potential
feed.summary: Rockwell Automation (ROK) is showing pre-market interest at $410.66, driven by demand for AI-enabled industrial automation, despite recent modest profit-taking. Meyka AI gives ROK a "BUY" rating with a short-term target of $430.61, indicating a 4.86% upside, and highlights revenue growth potential from AI adoption.
